title: Swapixel: How Did We Get Here?
description: A Hypixel Skyblock resource pack focusing on swapping various items with each other, giving you a brand new, yet familiar & weird experience.
body:
![Intro Header](https://imagedelivery.net/W9K_l6ndK9x4x8m3rurakg/177ae0bb-19f2-4579-7370-5737678b9b00/original)

A Hypixel Skyblock resource pack that intends to bring a unique experience by swapping collections, materials and minerals, including changing their crafting trees!

FAQ:

- Do I need any mods to use this?
> - Yes! You have to use [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) and [NotEnoughUpdates](https://github.com/Moulberry/NotEnoughUpdates/releases).

> - *Additionally, it's **heavily** recommended to use [Skyhanni](https://github.com/hannibal002/SkyHanni/releases) for the full, intended experience as the pack allows you to change the colour values and names of items. I wish there was a case where you could use a resource pack to change the name of the items, but unfortunately there isn't. Please do join our [discord server](https://discord.gg/2s4y8mZvR2) to be able to get the commands or the visual_words.json file for the renamed items, and it shouldn't take long to set everything up!*

- Does this pack support 1.20+?
> - Not yet! The plan is to first update this pack on 1.8.9 before porting it forwards.

- What does this pack change?
> - Currently, it only swaps Dwarven Mines related content, but i'm planning on expanding on the concept and going onto different islands!

- NotEnoughUpdates doesn't re-texture certain mineable and non-mineable blocks, how do I fix this?
> - Sadly, this is a bug with NotEnoughUpdates itself and i've been waiting for a fix for over a year now. As of right now, there are no fixes and we're just waiting an update to the mod itself that fixes these inconsistencies!

- How do you get the ideas for the item swaps?
> - It depends, I may make an idea on my own or ask the community for feedback or suggestions. Overall, i'd like to make this resource pack as best as it can be, and as unique as it can be too with the help & effort of the community.

- Am I allowed to make my own iteration of a Hypixel Skyblock Swap resource pack?
> - Of course! This isn't a trademarked idea lol. I want this pack to be a key to like a gateway of weird stuff, so people can know that it's okay to make more than just a resource pack that adds-in textures for items. Why not have some fun with it?

- Am I allowed to make an [X] Resource Pack-like versions of this pack, to act as addons for other packs?
> - Definitely, please do credit the pack and/or me in the description though! 
> Here's a small funfact; this resource pack was originally going to be a fan-made addon for Furfsky, using the same swap concept in the pack's art style. In the end, I ended up going the standalone route.

- Can I use the textures from this pack in my own texture packs?
> - Only if it's a personal pack! Please don't upload and claim ownership of the sprites. If anything, you may message me on discord so we could discuss it!
